mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Ida B. Reed, Until 03.06.1904 when she became 21 years of age.
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Ida B. Reed, Until 03.06.1904 when she became 21 years of age. Elisha Reed, Guardian until 03.06.1904 Recorded in Settlement Book 1,Page 116-119, in the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
